---
title: Coordinator Environment Variables
description: Configuration reference for the MX8 coordinator process
---

## Overview

The coordinator runs the job control plane, managing leases, dataset ownership, and agent heartbeats. It binds a gRPC port (default `0.0.0.0:50051`) and serves control-plane traffic only—it never proxies dataset data bytes.

## Network Configuration

<ParamField path="MX8_COORD_BIND_ADDR" type="string" default="0.0.0.0:50051">
  gRPC bind address for the coordinator service.
  
  Format: `<host>:<port>` (e.g., `0.0.0.0:50051`, `127.0.0.1:8080`)
  
  **Stability**: `stable`
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="MX8_GRPC_MAX_MESSAGE_BYTES" type="integer" default="67108864">
  Maximum gRPC message size in bytes (64MB default).
  
  **Must match** the same setting on all agents and clients.
  
  **Stability**: `stable`
</ParamField>

## World Membership

<ParamField path="MX8_WORLD_SIZE" type="integer" default="1">
  Total number of agents in the job. The coordinator waits for this many agents to join before starting work distribution.
  
  Set explicitly in production—do not rely on the default.
  
  **Stability**: `stable`
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="MX8_MIN_WORLD_SIZE" type="integer" default="0">
  Minimum number of agents required before the coordinator starts. If set to `0`, defaults to `MX8_WORLD_SIZE`.
  
  Useful for testing partial deployments.
  
  **Stability**: `stable`
</ParamField>

## Dataset and Manifest Store

<ParamField path="MX8_DATASET_LINK" type="string" default="unset">
  Dataset reference path. Supports three formats:
  
  - **Plain path/prefix**: `s3://bucket/dataset` (not recommended for production)
  - **Auto-refresh**: `s3://bucket/dataset/@refresh` (resolves latest manifest)
  - **Pinned hash**: `s3://bucket/dataset/@sha256:<hash>` (immutable reference)
  
  **Production**: Always use `@refresh` or `@sha256:<hash>` suffix.
  
  **Stability**: `stable`
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="MX8_MANIFEST_STORE_ROOT" type="string" default="~/.mx8/manifests">
  Root path for manifest storage. Can be a filesystem path or S3/Azure/GCS prefix.
  
  Examples:
  - `~/.mx8/manifests` (local filesystem)
  - `s3://bucket/manifests/` (S3)
  - `az://container/manifests/` (Azure Blob)
  - `gs://bucket/manifests/` (GCS)
  
  **Production**: Use durable S3 or shared storage, not local ephemeral disk.
  
  **Stability**: `stable`
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="MX8_MANIFEST_HASH" type="string" default="dev">
  Legacy pinned manifest hash path. Use `MX8_DATASET_LINK` with `@sha256:` suffix instead.
  
  **Stability**: `stable` (deprecated)
</ParamField>

## Heartbeat and Lease Timing

<ParamField path="MX8_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_MS" type="integer" default="1000">
  Heartbeat cadence (in milliseconds) returned to agents.
  
  Agents report progress and renew leases at this interval.
  
  **Stability**: `stable`
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="MX8_LEASE_TTL_MS" type="integer" default="10000">
  Time-to-live (in milliseconds) for agent leases before expiry.
  
  If an agent stops heartbeating for this duration, the coordinator requeues the unfinished range.
  
  **Stability**: `stable`
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="MX8_LEASE_LOG_PATH" type="string" default="<manifest_store_root>/../lease_logs/<manifest_hash>.log">
  Write-ahead log path for lease state replay.
  
  Set to `none` to disable lease logging (not recommended for production).
  
  **Stability**: `stable`
</ParamField>

## High Availability (HA)

<ParamField path="MX8_COORD_HA_ENABLE" type="boolean" default="true">
  Enable leader-fencing mode using a shared lease file.
  
  Multiple coordinator instances can run; only one becomes leader.
  
  **Stability**: `stable`
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="MX8_COORD_HA_LEASE_PATH" type="string" default="<manifest_store_root>/../ha/<manifest_hash>.leader_lease">
  Shared leader lease file path for coordinator HA.
  
  All coordinator candidates must share this path.
  
  **Stability**: `stable`
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="MX8_COORD_HA_LEADER_ID" type="string" default="<hostname>-<pid>">
  Coordinator identity for HA lease records.
  
  Defaults to `<hostname>-<pid>` for uniqueness.
  
  **Stability**: `stable`
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="MX8_COORD_HA_LEASE_TTL_MS" type="integer" default="5000">
  Leader lease TTL in milliseconds.
  
  If a leader fails to renew within this window, another coordinator can take over.
  
  **Stability**: `stable`
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="MX8_COORD_HA_RENEW_INTERVAL_MS" type="integer" default="1000">
  Leader lease renewal cadence in milliseconds.
  
  **Stability**: `stable`
</ParamField>

## Durable State Store

<ParamField path="MX8_COORD_STATE_STORE_ENABLE" type="boolean" default="true">
  Enable shared state snapshots for coordinator recovery.
  
  When enabled, the coordinator writes periodic state snapshots to a shared file.
  
  **Stability**: `stable`
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="MX8_COORD_STATE_STORE_PATH" type="string" default="<manifest_store_root>/../state/<manifest_hash>.json">
  Shared state snapshot file path.
  
  All coordinator candidates must share this path for recovery.
  
  **Stability**: `stable`
</ParamField>

## Snapshot and Indexing

<ParamField path="MX8_SNAPSHOT_LOCK_STALE_MS" type="integer" default="60000">
  Stale threshold (in milliseconds) for snapshot locks.
  
  If a snapshot lock is older than this, it's considered abandoned.
  
  **Stability**: `stable`
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="MX8_SNAPSHOT_WAIT_TIMEOUT_MS" type="integer" default="30000">
  Maximum wait time (in milliseconds) for a concurrent indexer to finish.
  
  **Stability**: `stable`
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="MX8_SNAPSHOT_S3_EXTERNAL_SORT" type="boolean" default="false">
  Enable external merge-sort for large S3 dataset indexing.
  
  Reduces memory usage for massive datasets by spilling keys to disk.
  
  **Stability**: `experimental`
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="MX8_SNAPSHOT_S3_SPILL_KEYS_PER_RUN" type="integer" default="100000">
  Number of keys per external sort run when `MX8_SNAPSHOT_S3_EXTERNAL_SORT=true`.
  
  **Stability**: `experimental`
</ParamField>

## Deterministic Ordering

<ParamField path="MX8_SHUFFLE" type="boolean" default="false">
  Enable deterministic block shuffle.
  
  When enabled, work blocks are shuffled using `MX8_SEED` and `MX8_EPOCH`.
  
  **Stability**: `stable`
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="MX8_SEED" type="integer" default="0">
  Shuffle seed for deterministic ordering.
  
  Type: `u64`
  
  **Stability**: `stable`
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="MX8_EPOCH" type="integer" default="0">
  Epoch input for deterministic ordering.
  
  Type: `u32`
  
  **Stability**: `stable`
</ParamField>

## Dev and Testing

<ParamField path="MX8_DEV_MANIFEST_PATH" type="string" default="unset">
  Path to a dev manifest bootstrap file for local testing.
  
  **Stability**: `stable` (dev-only)
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="MX8_DEV_TOTAL_SAMPLES" type="integer" default="0">
  Synthetic sample count for dev-only testing (no real manifest).
  
  **Stability**: `stable` (dev-only)
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="MX8_DEV_BLOCK_SIZE" type="integer" default="65536">
  Work-range block size for dev-only synthetic datasets.
  
  **Stability**: `stable` (dev-only)
</ParamField>

## Metrics and Observability

<ParamField path="MX8_METRICS_SNAPSHOT_INTERVAL_MS" type="integer" default="0">
  Periodic metrics logging interval in milliseconds.
  
  Set to `0` to disable. Non-zero enables periodic metrics snapshots.
  
  **Stability**: `stable`
</ParamField>

## Example Configuration

<CodeGroup>
```bash Production
MX8_COORD_BIND_ADDR='0.0.0.0:50051' \
MX8_WORLD_SIZE=8 \
MX8_DATASET_LINK='s3://your-bucket/dataset/@refresh' \
MX8_MANIFEST_STORE_ROOT='s3://your-bucket/manifests/' \
MX8_GRPC_MAX_MESSAGE_BYTES=67108864 \
MX8_COORD_HA_ENABLE=true \
MX8_COORD_STATE_STORE_ENABLE=true \
target/release/mx8-coordinator
```

```bash Local Dev
MX8_COORD_BIND_ADDR='127.0.0.1:50051' \
MX8_WORLD_SIZE=1 \
MX8_DEV_MANIFEST_PATH='./manifest.tsv' \
MX8_MANIFEST_STORE_ROOT='~/.mx8/manifests' \
cargo run -p mx8-coordinator
```
</CodeGroup>
